taskContext.originalTask: Navigate to /claude-manager page in React application
taskContext.userExpectation: Navigate to page without creating Claude instances automatically
taskContext.actualBehavior: Claude instances created automatically on each navigation

failureMode.rootCause: React StrictMode double execution of useEffect hooks
failureMode.triggerCondition: Component mount in React 18 StrictMode environment
failureMode.leakPattern: Multiple instances created without user consent

claudeSolution.assumedSafety: Empty dependency array should run once

actualImplementation.strictModeImpact: Runs twice in development, creates duplicate resources

correctedSolution.preventionMechanism: Explicit user action required for resource creation

testPattern.verificationMethod: Monitor API calls and instance creation logs
testPattern.regressionTest: Automated navigation test with instance creation monitoring

neuralTrainingData.calculation: (0% user success / 90% claude confidence) * 0.1 TDD factor

tddPatterns: Test component mounting behavior in StrictMode
Mock resource creation functions and verify call counts
Test navigation scenarios with resource monitoring
Verify cleanup functions are properly called
detectionHooks: Monitor API calls during component lifecycle
Track resource creation in development vs production
Flag automatic resource creation in useEffect
codePatterns: Use explicit user actions for resource initialization
Implement proper cleanup in useEffect return

recommendations.architectural: Separate resource creation from component mounting
recommendations.testing: Add StrictMode-specific test coverage for resource patterns
recommendations.monitoring: Implement resource creation tracking in development
